chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 1712 of 2021 Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 649/2022. 2.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 22-02-2022 Date of Decision: 22-02-2022 Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for the Petitioners. O R D E R 1. Granted. 2. Pursuant to our order dated 09.12.2021, compliance has been made by filing bank statements of the Petitioners. We have perused the same and it appears that except two, rest of the petitioners’ statement reflects that the last salary was paid in 2010, whereas, in respect of two petitioners, it was paid in 2015. This Petition is hit by laches and while confronted, Counsel for the Petitioners submits that they are still in service. However, we are not satisfied as apparently Petitioners have approached this Court after lapse of considerable time when their salaries were not paid. Accordingly, this Petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed in limine with pending application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
